title: Only Rainbow Items
description: The texture pack with rainbow items. You need custom model data to use.
body:
# Only Rainbow Items

--- This resource pack adds new items to the game. # Supported items (for 1.20.4-1.21.3) Set your item's custom model data to 1 for them to work. 1. Netherite Pickaxe 2. Netherite Sword 3. Diamond 4. Bow 5. Ender Pearl # Avalible Item Models (1.21.4+) Set your item's item model to any of these values for them to work. * orb:super_pickaxe * orb:super_sword * orb:super_diamond * orb:super_bow * orb:super_ender_pearl * orb:uno_reverse
